Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Users Request Goal Construct an accepting Petri net for a complex insurance claim management process Components Places representing states between activities Transitions labeled with activity names Arcs connecting them logically Loops for DV RDS DV FC II FC Initial marking token in a start place Final marking token in an end place Tools pm4py library PetriNet Marking petri utils Output Python code constructing the net initial marking and final marking

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Process Flow Lets map out the sequence and branches loops Start CR Claim Registration CR DV Document Verification DV RDS Re Document Submission RDS DV loop DV FC Fraud Check FC II In depth Investigation II FC loop FC CA Claim Assessment CA AP Approval AP P Payment P N Notification N CL Closure CL End

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Refine the places and transitions Places p start p cr p dv p rds p fc p ii p ca p ap p p p n p cl p end Transitions CR DV RDS FC II CA AP P N CL Arcs p start CR CR p cr p cr DV DV p dv p dv RDS RDS p dv p dv FC FC p fc p fc II II p fc p fc CA CA p ca and so on This matches Petri net conventions

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Check pm4py API PetriNet name PetriNet Place name PetriNet Transition name label net places add place net transitions add transition petri utils add arc from to source target net Marking dictionary like im Marking im p start 1 fm Marking fm p end 1 The example shows source sink execute activity etc

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Draft the Code Mental Refinement Initialize the Petri Net Define Places p start p cr etc Add places to net Define Transitions t cr label Claim Registration etc Add transitions to net Define Arcs Start to CR CR to p cr etc DV loop RDS FC loop II etc Initial Marking im p start 1 Final Marking fm p end 1

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Note on AP The prompt says must be approved if amount surpasses threshold For simplicity model as direct flow CA AP P Given prompts focus keep it simple CA AP P

Name: Validation - NE
Text: Verify against Requirements Accepting Petri Net Yes Places states Yes Transitions labeled Yes Arcs logical Yes Loops DV RDS FC II Yes Initial token start Final closed claim Yes One minor point choice branch from DV handled by arcs to RDS and FC naturally Check pm4py signature matches example All good potential pitfalls add arc signature Marking works All looks solid

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Self Correction Verification during thought verify add arc from to signature in pm4py follow prompts example exactly Change place names to after cr after dv etc to avoid confusion Final check prompt places states between activities loops between DV RDS FC II initial start new claim final closed claim All good Output generation
